sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ هِنْدٌ أَنْ تَتَعَلَّمَ كَيْفَ تَأْخُذُ صُورَةً جَيِّدَةً.
sentences.translation: Hind je htjela naučiti kako napraviti dobru fotografiju.
sentences.translationEn: Hind wanted to learn how to take a good photo.

sentences.arabic: شَاهَدَتْ فِيدِيُو قَصِيرًا عَنْ التَّصْوِيرِ بِالْهَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Pogledala je kratki video o fotografisanju telefonom.
sentences.translationEn: She watched a short video about phone photography.

sentences.arabic: جَرَّبَتْ مَا تَعَلَّمَتْهُ وَأَخَذَتْ صُوَرًا جَمِيلَةً.
sentences.translation: Isprobala je ono što je naučila i napravila lijepe fotografije.
sentences.translationEn: She tried what she learned and took beautiful photos.

sentences.translation: Objavila je fotografije i svi su im se divili.
sentences.translationEn: She posted the photos and everyone was impressed.
